entry.title: New: CR 24-106 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending FIRST READING of Bill 153 (2024), to conditionally allow exemptions that were in effect for tax year 2024, where improvements were destroyed, damaged, or made inaccessible by the August 2023 Maui wildfires, to remain in effect through December 31, 2026.

Budget, Finance, and Economic Development Committee (2023-2025)

View on the council site
